name: Freshservice
description: Monitor Freshservice IT agents and incident tickets for ITSM compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Freshservice
2. Go to Profile Settings (top-right avatar)
3. Copy your API Key
4. Enter the API key below along with your subdomain in each check

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Freshservice Profile Settings (top-right avatar > Profile Settings)

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews Freshservice agents and their IT service access

checks.name: Incident Response
checks.description: Verifies Freshservice has a process for tracking and resolving incidents
